rules.name: Compliance_Outstanding
rules.conditionLogic: 1 OR 8 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 9 OR 10 OR (6 AND 7)
rules.label: Compliance Outstanding

screens.name: Carousel_Screen
screens.label: Carousel Screen

fields.name: Title
fields.fieldText: Welcome to Blue Arrow! Here's what to expect with your registration:

screens.nextOrFinishButtonLabel: Click here to start your registration

fields.name: Complete_Text_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Complete

Thank you for completing your onboarding tasks, the next step is to attend a Proof Of Right To Work check so we can verify your documents. This is currently being arranged with your line manager and we will be in touch over the coming days to inform you of your allocated time slot. 

 

Once complete, you will have access to your portal by using this same page and login as you have done today. Make sure to bookmark this page and login at your convenience, where you can view your pay slip, log hours (where applicable) and book annual leave (where applicable).

 

Thanks again and Welcome to the Blue Arrow Family…

fields.name: Complete_Text_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Thank you for registering your interest in working with Blue Arrow. When or if there is suitable work, we will contact you.

fields.name: Complete_Text_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Thank you for registering your interest in working with Blue Arrow. When or if there is suitable work, we will contact you.

fields.name: Complete_Text_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Complete

Thank you for completing the registration process, our compliance team will review the information you have provided us and will contact you directly should we require any further details.


We look forward to you starting your assignment with us.

fields.name: Complete_Text_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Complete

Thank you for completing your onboarding tasks. One of our team will be in touch shortly with the next steps.

fields.name: Consent_0_0
fields.fieldText:
﻿Future Contact Consent

If you would like us to contact you with regard to future roles or career initiatives which are relevant to your work history and may be of interest to you please tick the relevant boxes below. 


This would require us to hold some of your personal data on our candidate database, including your name, date of birth, contact details and work history.


For further details on how we use and store your data please review our privacy notice. You can also unsubscribe at any time by contacting dpo@rssglobal.com.


Please check the boxes below to specify the form of contact you consent to:

fields.name: Compliance_Missing_Text
fields.fieldText:
Your Onboarding “To Do” list…

Below is a list of all the forms we need you to complete, these can be done in any order and you can log out and come back as you choose.

fields.name: PORTW_Text
fields.fieldText:
Right to Work

In order to verify your legal right to work in the UK we need to capture the following:

  • A legal form of ID
  • Visa details (if applicable)
  • Proof of National Insurance

fields.name: Declaration_Text
fields.fieldText: Declaration Checks

fields.name: WTR_Text
fields.fieldText: Working Time Regulations

fields.name: Equal_Ops_Text
fields.fieldText: Equal Opportunities

fields.name: Medical_Text
fields.fieldText: Personal Information

fields.name: TOE_Text
fields.fieldText: Terms of Engagement

fields.name: Bank_Details_Text
fields.fieldText: Banking and Tax Information

fields.name: Reference_Text
fields.fieldText: References

fields.name: FairEmployment_Text
fields.fieldText: Fair Employment Monitoring

fields.name: Driving_Text
fields.fieldText: Driving Licence

fields.name: WTRT_Text
fields.fieldText: Driving Workforce Agreement

fields.name: Student_Study_Timetable
fields.fieldText: Student Study Timetable

fields.name: Welcome_Text
fields.fieldText:
Hi {!Get_Candidate.FirstName}, Welcome to {!Get_Candidate.Brand__c}!


As you'd expect, there are a couple of basic legal requirements we're both expected to meet before we can offer you work.


We know you came to us for work and not to complete forms, so we promise we'll try to make this as quick and easy as possible.


You will need the following documentation/information to hand to complete this process:

fields.name: BATate_Documents
fields.fieldText:
• Proof of right to work in the UK documentation – this is usually a passport or passport and visa combination but if you are unsure please let us know (Image required)
  • Your Bank Details and NI Number

﻿Once you have the required documents to hand please click next to proceed.

fields.name: SRGMGG_Documents
fields.fieldText:
• Proof of right to work in the UK documentation – this is usually a passport or passport and visa combination but if you are unsure please let us know (Image required)
  • 2 Recent Proof of address dated within the last 3 months ( Utility bill, Council Tax Statement, HMRC Tax notification, Financial Statement (Bank).
  • Your Bank Details and NI Number

As part of the recruitment process you may be subject to recruitment checks in line with UK government screening, Baseline Personnel security Standard (BPSS )which comprises of verification for the following four main elements: 

  • Identity  
  • Nationality and Immigration Status (including an entitlement to undertake the work in question)
  • Employment history (past 3 years)
  • Criminal record (unspent convictions only)

Should you during this process supply any false information or fail to disclose relevant information, it could be grounds for refusal/dismissal and could amount to a criminal offence.


﻿Once you have the required documents to hand please click next to proceed.

fields.name: Welcome_Text_0
fields.fieldText:
Hi {!Get_Candidate.FirstName}, Welcome to Blue Arrow!


There are a couple of basic details that we would like to capture/confirm to ensure a smooth transfer to Blue Arrow.

 

No one likes to complete forms, so we promise we'll try to make this as quick and easy as possible.

 

Please work your way through each short step; once all are complete we will be in touch to confirm a Proof of Right To Work Check with one of the team which we are obliged to undertake legally.

 

Click next to start your Blue Arrow onboarding - we look forward to having you as part of the team.
